cycle: D+H bypass coverage hardening (post-cycle 20260519-151734 codex triage)

meta.note: Authoritative ACs for D+H cycle. The ticket markdown at docs/dev/ticket-20260519-211515.md is the human-readable spec; this JSON is the machine-readable mirror. 10 ACs total: 4 for /allow asymmetry (D), 5 for tracker race (H, AC-H1/H2/H3a/H3b/H4), 1 cross-cycle no-regression (AC-D-H).

acceptance_criteria.when: main-agent Read tool call hits PreToolUse
acceptance_criteria.then: read_grant('Read', sid) returns False; hook proceeds to next gate (no /allow bypass)

acceptance_criteria.when: main-agent Read tool call hits PreToolUse then PostToolUse
acceptance_criteria.then: PreTool returns True (bypass granted); PostTool consume_grant_for_posttool unlinks the grant file (single-use enforced)

acceptance_criteria.when: each of 6 production PreTool callers (orchestrator-gate.py:184, subagent-enforce.py:214, write-guard.sh:39, aggregate-check.py:389, read-size-guard.py:72, block-enterworktree.sh:48) invokes read_grant
acceptance_criteria.then: exact-only matching works for all 6 — no regression
regex matching unchanged from current behavior

acceptance_criteria.given: Orchestrator dispatches TodoWrite (Step N in_progress) and Agent (matching subagent_type) in SAME response
acceptance_criteria.then: tracker writes subagent_calls[str(idx_N)] = True via Case A bounded-window typed lookup

acceptance_criteria.given: Orchestrator dispatches TodoWrite (Step N in_progress) THEN Agent in a LATER response (serial)
acceptance_criteria.then: tracker writes subagent_calls[str(idx_N)] = True via Case B legacy chain

acceptance_criteria.given: subagent_type absent in stdin AND _current_in_progress_index returns a single valid index AND that step has subagent_call metadata
acceptance_criteria.then: subagent_calls[str(idx)] = True is recorded for that target

acceptance_criteria.given: any of: (subagent_type absent + legacy None) | (subagent_type non-empty + typed None) | (no in_progress + subagent_type non-empty) | (multiple in_progress + subagent_type non-empty)
acceptance_criteria.then: subagent_calls is unchanged (no None key, no wrong-step flip, no fall-through corruption)

acceptance_criteria.when: any TodoWrite attempts to mark a subagent-required step completed
acceptance_criteria.then: validator still requires the matching subagent dispatch to have been recorded in subagent_calls (no validator no-op)

acceptance_criteria.given: prior cycle 20260519-151734's pretool-read-size-guard.py + pretool-block-enterworktree.sh /do + /allow bypass paths
acceptance_criteria.when: the 9 ACs from prior cycle's smoke tests re-run with the new exact-only read_grant
acceptance_criteria.then: all 9 ACs still PASS (exact-match grant bodies are unaffected; substring-match grant bodies that would have substring-matched before now correctly reject)
